title: coprosma villosa
intro: Coprosma villosa, also known as the Forest Smoke plant, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and skin problems due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coprosma villosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic. Coprosma villosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
